build and
explore.

mosaic · worn · seconddoor · question bank · python · swift · react · claude api · agentic pipelines · data · ai · nlp · api integration · barnard college · columbia university · bangkok · new york · mosaic · worn · seconddoor · question bank · python · swift · react · claude api · agentic pipelines · data · ai · nlp · api integration · barnard college · columbia university · bangkok · new york · 
Selected projects 2024 — 2026
01
mosaic
Agentic document privacy auditing pipeline. Detects sensitive information leakage including cross-document inference risks — what no single document reveals alone.
python claude api fastapi react
2026 ↗
02
worn
AI-powered digital closet for iOS. Upload photos of your clothes, search with natural language. Built to surface what you've forgotten, not just what fits the filters.
swift swiftui claude vision ios
2026 ↗
03
seconddoor
Backend for a nonprofit housing platform connecting renters with unconventional backgrounds to fair landlords. Migrated the app off Base44, moved it to Git, and integrated the RentCast API to display live NYC listings.
python rentcast api backend git migration
2025 ↗
04
question bank
Fine-tuned model for question generation from course material. Hit the limits of local compute — the experience taught me more about what I want to build next than the project itself did.
python fine-tuning nlp
2024 ↗

A bit
about me

I'm Min, a sophomore at Barnard College studying CS and Economics. I'm from Bangkok, currently in New York.

I don't have one fixed thing I'm building toward — I'm interested in AI and data, but honestly I'm more interested in making things that work and seeing what I learn from them.

Most of what I know came from shipping something and figuring out what broke.

Currently
Barnard College, Columbia University CS + Economics, Class of 2029 Bangkok / New York
Interests
AI + data systems Building things that actually work Figuring out what broke and why
Open to
Research positions AI / data internships Interesting projects
